friendly_name: Bootstrap Playwright for dashboard UI regression coverage
purpose_context: Playwright is not installed today; a dashboard click-through bug (PR 970: WP modal drops the agent field) shipped green because no layer exercised the flow. M6 of epic 1931. One-time framework bootstrap + ONE regression-guard e2e test + CI job (headless, synthetic-mission temp root) + docs; comprehensive UI coverage + visual regression are out of scope. Closes 1008.
purpose_tldr: Install pytest-playwright + one representative end-to-end test (kanban WP-card click -> modal asserts agent identity + prompt) + CI wiring, so the CLAUDE.md 'Playwright proof' rule points at a runnable test instead of an aspiration
